response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of C/C++ exposure (National Instruments, 2014-2015) versus the required 5-10 years, no demonstrated Windows-platform focus, no SQL Server or Oracle experience (only MySQL/MongoDB/generic SQL), and no fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. Their strengths are in TypeScript/Node, DLang, and web/GIS systems, which do not align with this role.
strengths: Senior-level engineer with 10+ years across diverse stacks and strong engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang microservices and C/C++ at National Instruments
Strong communication signals: workshops, public talks, and teaching experience
concerns: C++ experience is roughly 6 months and over a decade old; far short of the 5-10 year requirement
No SQL Server or Oracle experience and no Windows-platform development history
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows background
